<!--
Thanks for contributing!

Before opening this PR, please confirm:

- [ ] Every commit is signed off (`git commit -s`) — DCO required
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By:` AI trailers in commit messages
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally (lint + typecheck + tests + audit)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new logic
- [ ] No customer addresses, product names, or order details in log statements

PRs that don't pass CI cannot merge.
-->

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Bullet list. -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration test still passes (`@vendure/testing` boots Vendure cleanly)
- [ ] Demo VM verification (if behavior touches the strategy code path)

## Checklist

- [ ] DCO sign-off on every commit
- [ ] `npm run check` green
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry (if user-visible)
- [ ] No PII in logs (no customer addresses, emails, product names)
